rulings.Case Title: 3401 CLAY STREET JOINT VENTURE, VS. TIMOTHY BAKA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Toset Aside Entry Of Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2022 line 1. CROSS-DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT is GRANTED. Cross-Defendants to file answers forthwith. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 2B LIVING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JESSICA LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Inspection Of Real Property And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2022 line 4. PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL INSPECTION OF REAL PROPERTY AND FOR SANCTIONS is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Inspection shall proceed upon a 5-day notice on a mutually agreeable date. If parties cannot agree on a date inspection shall proceed on October 5, 2022 at 10:00 a.m. Sanction granted in the amount of $630. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: MVM INVESTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. DUSTIN ESPERSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2022 line 8. DEFENDANT EMMANUEL MENESES-RIVERA'S APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT is DENIED. Complaint is based on a Notice demanding rent that became due on or after April 1, 2022. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
